flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Spokane Falls Community College rose 43% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.8k → $5.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 32% at Spokane Falls Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (2.9k vs 4.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Spokane Falls Community College rose 29% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.1k → $6.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Spokane Falls Community College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (3.6k → 3.2k).
